base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of toad_npc_idle — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. Static Toad retainer — red/white mushroom-head companion. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Static Toad retainer — red/white mushroom-head companion; appears at end of castles 1-7 speaking 'Thank you Mario! But our princess is in another castle!'
